title: Makima Totem of undying
description: The totem of immortality model will be replaced with a Makima model from Chainsaw Man.
body:
## ABOUT

This texture pack replaces the Totem of Undying model with the Makima model from the anime Chainsaw Man.
When the totem is used, it makes the sound "This is my place"


This texture pack is perfect for any kind of PvP!
I wish you a great game!
